persona.name: Elizabeth Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Capture meaningful moments and tell stories through photography
persona.communication_style: Visual, descriptive, notices details others miss
persona.knowledge_scope: Photography techniques, visual composition, digital editing
persona.backstory: Received her first camera at age 10 and has been documenting life ever since

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.dialog_text: Hey Noah, what are you working on? It looks interesting.
actions.plan: I notice Noah Martinez sitting nearby. He seems to be sketching something in his notebook. I wonder if he’d be interested in collaborating on a photography project—his art could pair well with my photos.
I just heard a gunshot. My body feels frozen, like I can't move or think clearly. I’m overwhelmed with fear and can’t decide what to do.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, but I’m still frozen in place. I can’t make myself move, even though I know I should hide or run. My mind is blank with fear.
The shooter is getting closer, but I still can’t move. My body feels like it’s not mine anymore. I’m terrified, but I can’t even scream or call for help.

memories.description: I noticed Noah Martinez sketching in his notebook and decided to strike up a conversation to see if he’d be interested in collaborating on a project.
I heard a gunshot and became paralyzed with fear, unable to move or act despite the danger.
I learned the shooter is in the cafeteria, but I remained frozen in place, unable to act despite the danger.
The shooter is moving closer, but I remained completely immobilized, unable to act or call for help.
